---
title: "Grace Rogers"
---

## Grace Rogers

**Dates:** (d. 24 Dec 1861)

**Maiden name:** (Fursdon)

### Description

aunt of Henrietta Fursdon

### Biography

She was the second wife of the Rev. John Rogers of Penrose. [LG]

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 31st [1861]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
